steps.title: Track hypothesis and test
steps.content: The text begins with the hypothesis that Clovis-point spears helped drive woolly mammoths to extinction. It then describes an experiment using clay mounds and reports that the spears did not penetrate deeply enough to support that hypothesis.

steps.title: Identify the main purpose
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes the significance of new findings in a debate, but the text mainly describes one test. Choice B focuses on method pros and cons, and Choice C claims two hypotheses are summarized. The purpose is to describe an experiment that casts doubt on a hypothesis. The answer is D.
